user_prompt: Bless the Tarantula sentry gun for reset
prayer:
Approach the Tarantula sentry gun with reverence, chanting the Litany of Purgation to awaken its dormant Machine Spirit.
Beseech the Omnissiah to absolve the Tarantula sentry gun of errant targeting protocols prior to reset.
Initiate the reset rite by anointing its auspex arrays with sacred oils and cycling power conduits.
Verify the Machine Spirit's purity through diagnostic canticles as the Tarantula sentry gun stirs anew.

user_prompt: Consecrate the neutron laser before recalibration
prayer:

Sanctify the neutron laser's focusing crystals with incense of sanctified promethium before recalibration.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the neutron laser to align its beam matrices in Omnissiah's name.
Commence recalibration whilst murmuring the Canticle of Coherence, ensuring lethal harmony restored.

Monitor the Machine Spirit's assent through auspex scans as preparation sequences engage fully.
